name: Reuben Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cream cheese, minced onion, sauerkraut, corned beef, and bread crumbs.
2. Shape the mixture into 24 balls.
3. Dip each ball in flour, then egg, and finally coat with more bread crumbs.
4. Pan fry the balls until they are brown on all sides.
5. Serve warm.
